# Veinminer++ 0.1.0 (Minecraft 26.1.x)

First public release — a performant, tool-aware vein miner for Fabric and NeoForge,
built from a shared `common/` source so both loaders behave identically.

## Added
- **Hold Sneak to vein-mine** the whole connected vein when you break a block.
- **Three shapes**, cycled with `[` / `]`: **Vein** (connected matching blocks),
  **3×3×3** (an oriented box in front of you), and an opt-in **Spread** with a larger cap.
- **Tool-aware mining** with any vanilla or modded tool — a block that wouldn't drop for
  your tool is never broken (no wasted swings on obsidian with an iron pickaxe).
- **Smart ore / fuzzy matching** that follows veins of related block variants by tag.
- **Optional toolless mining** of soft blocks (dirt, sand, grass) by hand or any item;
  toggle "Require a tool" to demand a tool instead.
- **Tree felling** with a smart-tree safety net that spares log- and wood-block *builds*
  (no leaves attached), plus **isolated-canopy leaf cleanup** with decay-equivalent drops.
- **Performance:** per-shape block caps and a lenient per-tick stagger keep big veins and
  trees off a single-frame spike.
- **Durability control:** per-block cost configurable from 0–150% of vanilla.
- **In-game config** via Cloth Config (ModMenu on Fabric, mod list on NeoForge), and an
  xray-style edge guide for the 3×3×3 shape.

## Requirements
- Minecraft 26.1.x and Java 25.
- **Fabric:** Fabric API (Cloth Config is bundled; ModMenu optional).
- **NeoForge:** Cloth Config.
